summary: Iteration 11 testing completed - Manage Subscription feature FULLY VERIFIED. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend ManageSubscription dialog works correctly: (1) Profile dialog shows subtle 'Manage subscription' link (opacity: 0.4, fontSize: 11.2px - intentionally subtle as per user request), (2) Clicking link opens ManageSubscription dialog, (3) Dialog shows current plan (Explorer for free users), (4) 'Upgrade Plan' button visible for free users, (5) Payment history section displays transaction list, (6) Cancel trigger correctly hidden for free users (only shows for paid users), (7) Pricing modal and 2-step checkout still work.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscription/history requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/subscription/history returns transaction list for authenticated users
Backend: POST /api/subscription/cancel requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/cancel returns 400 for free users (no active subscription)
Backend: GET /api/subscription/status returns current plan info
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns all 3 plans with correct prices
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns current user after login
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat returns 403 for free users (subscription gating)
Frontend: Auth gate renders correctly with Hyt Orbis branding
Frontend: Login works with admin credentials
Frontend: Profile dialog opens from header profile button
Frontend: Profile dialog shows subtle 'Manage subscription' link (opacity: 0.4, fontSize: 11.2px)
Frontend: Clicking 'Manage subscription' opens ManageSubscription dialog
Frontend: ManageSubscription dialog shows current plan (Explorer Plan for free users)
Frontend: ManageSubscription dialog shows 'Upgrade Plan' button for free users
Frontend: ManageSubscription dialog shows payment history section with transactions
Frontend: Cancel trigger correctly hidden for free users
Frontend: Pricing modal opens from header 'Upgrade' button
Frontend: Pricing grid shows 3 plan cards (Explorer $0, Creator $9, Developer $29)
Frontend: 2-step checkout flow works (plan selection -> payment methods)
Frontend: Payment methods view shows Stripe and PayPal options
Frontend: 'Back to plans' button returns to plan grid
Frontend: AI panel shows gated message for free users
critical_code_review_comments: ManageSubscription.jsx correctly implements the subscription management dialog with all required features
The 'Manage subscription' link in profile dialog is intentionally subtle (opacity: 0.4, fontSize: 0.7rem) as per user request
Cancel trigger only shows for paid users (plan !== 'free') - correctly hidden for free users
Cancel trigger has deliberately subtle styling (opacity: 0.5, fontSize: 0.7rem) as per user request for 'hidden slightly not obvious'
Payment history fetched via fetchPaymentHistory() on dialog open
Backend subscription.py correctly implements GET /subscription/history and POST /subscription/cancel endpoints
Cancel endpoint properly validates active subscription before allowing cancellation
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin account for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 testing completed successfully. ManageSubscription feature FULLY VERIFIED: (1) Profile dialog has subtle 'Manage subscription' link at bottom (data-testid='profile-manage-sub-link', opacity: 0.4), (2) ManageSubscription dialog shows current plan info, upgrade button for free users, payment history, (3) Cancel trigger only visible for paid users with deliberately subtle styling (opacity: 0.5), (4) All previous features (pricing modal, 2-step checkout, AI gating) still working. Note: Admin user is on free plan, so cancel option won't be visible in tests.

features_tested.manage_subscription_link: Profile dialog shows subtle 'Manage subscription' link (opacity: 0.4)
features_tested.manage_subscription_dialog: Dialog shows current plan, upgrade button, payment history
features_tested.cancel_trigger_hidden: Cancel trigger correctly hidden for free users
features_tested.ai_gating: AI panel shows gated message for free users

design_notes.manage_sub_link_styling: opacity: 0.4, fontSize: 0.7rem - intentionally subtle as per user request
design_notes.cancel_trigger_styling: opacity: 0.5, fontSize: 0.7rem - deliberately hard to find as per user request 'hidden slightly not obvious'
